query:
SELECT cp.id, cp.userId, u.email, u.name, cp.title, cp.fideRating, cp.hourlyRateCents, u.stripeConnectAccountId, u.stripeConnectOnboarded 
FROM coach_profiles cp 
JOIN users u ON cp.userId = u.id 
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user o7gqiRJAqhDK5GQ.9c38f5a63e4d --database Xkyng35xnYFybYAdmyVo96 --execute SELECT cp.id, cp.userId, u.email, u.name, cp.title, cp.fideRating, cp.hourlyRateCents, u.stripeConnectAccountId, u.stripeConnectOnboarded 
FROM coach_profiles cp 
JOIN users u ON cp.userId = u.id 
LIMIT 5;
